notes: Constructive close holds — VIX 16.4, chip-led Nasdaq rally, oil back near pre-war levels, day P&L +$33.4k. Keeping risk at 0.5 into the Juneteenth holiday (market closed Friday) to limit fresh exposure over the 3-day weekend despite the healed tape.
journal_entry: Holding 0.5 neutral into Juneteenth closure — tape stays good (VIX 16.4, chips leading, +$33.4k) but I don't want big new positions gapping over the long weekend. Avoids unchanged: parabolic AMC(+24.6%)/BFLY(+67%)/GPUS, CLOV pop, AAPL extended, AMD/ROKU/SABR soft. Memory theme MU/MRVL/SNDK/NBIS still leading; reassess re-risking Monday on yields and momentum follow-through.
